description: Using the Arch workbench in FreeCAD, create a structural steel bay. The bay must include a structural axis system with intersections at (0,0), (4000,0), (0,3000), and (4000,3000). Place four columns (200mm x 200mm, height 3000mm, role 'Column') at each intersection starting from Z=0. Connect the tops of the columns along the X-axis with two beams (200mm width x 300mm height, length 4000mm, role 'Beam') positioned at Z=3000mm. Save the project as /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/structural_frame.FCStd.
